markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize the content review process and strategy for upcoming blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/nhCGuza1EXZ-EJho9ss7jFJGDYJaKpWF?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Review Workflow:** A new Airtable-driven workflow will manage the 5 articles/week cadence, routing content from Sarah (tone) to Justin/Product (accuracy) to ensure technical correctness.](https://fathom.video/share/nhCGuza1EXZ-EJho9ss7jFJGDYJaKpWF?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** The strategy is to publish foundational "Hub" articles first to build internal linking authority before writing supporting "Spoke" articles.](https://fathom.video/share/nhCGuza1EXZ-EJho9ss7jFJGDYJaKpWF?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)
  - [**Terminology Alignment:** GrowthX will research the best term for Read's enterprise search tool ("searchable knowledge graph" vs. "enterprise search") to ensure all content uses consistent, high-intent language.](https://fathom.video/share/nhCGuza1EXZ-EJho9ss7jFJGDYJaKpWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
  - [**Interactive Content Brainstorm:** Sarah proposed a "productivity calculator" to prove Read's impact. GrowthX will research programmatic page opportunities, noting it's a separate workstream.](https://fathom.video/share/nhCGuza1EXZ-EJho9ss7jFJGDYJaKpWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)

## Topics

### Content Review Process

  - [**Problem:** The current review process is inefficient for the upcoming 5 articles/week cadence, risking delays and technical inaccuracies.](https://fathom.video/share/nhCGuza1EXZ-EJho9ss7jFJGDYJaKpWF?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Solution → New Airtable Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/nhCGuza1EXZ-EJho9ss7jFJGDYJaKpWF?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
      - [**Trigger:** GrowthX tags Sarah on Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/nhCGuza1EXZ-EJho9ss7jFJGDYJaKpWF?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
      - [**Step 1 (Tone):** Sarah reviews for tone/context, adds comments, and updates Airtable status.](https://fathom.video/share/nhCGuza1EXZ-EJho9ss7jFJGDYJaKpWF?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)
      - [**Step 2 (Accuracy):** Justin/Product review for technical accuracy, focusing on highlighted Read mentions.](https://fathom.video/share/nhCGuza1EXZ-EJho9ss7jFJGDYJaKpWF?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
      - [**Step 3 (Publish):** GrowthX implements feedback and publishes.](https://fathom.video/share/nhCGuza1EXZ-EJho9ss7jFJGDYJaKpWF?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [**Interim Plan:** Justin and Sarah will sync tomorrow on the first 3 articles to validate the new process.](https://fathom.video/share/nhCGuza1EXZ-EJho9ss7jFJGDYJaKpWF?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)

### Content Strategy: Hub & Spoke Model

  - [**Goal:** Build Google authority for core topics by publishing foundational "Hub" articles first.](https://fathom.video/share/nhCGuza1EXZ-EJho9ss7jFJGDYJaKpWF?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This establishes internal linking structure, signaling to Google that Hub pages are authoritative resources.](https://fathom.video/share/nhCGuza1EXZ-EJho9ss7jFJGDYJaKpWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)
  - [**Cadence:** Hubs (first 3 articles) → Spokes (this week's 5 articles) → Hubs (next week's articles).](https://fathom.video/share/nhCGuza1EXZ-EJho9ss7jFJGDYJaKpWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1790.0)
  - [**Review Scope:** Sarah's review focuses on tone and correct Read references, not deep content edits, as GrowthX handles SEO-optimized length (\~1,500 words).](https://fathom.video/share/nhCGuza1EXZ-EJho9ss7jFJGDYJaKpWF?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)

### Terminology & New Content Ideas

  - [**Enterprise Search Terminology:**](https://fathom.video/share/nhCGuza1EXZ-EJho9ss7jFJGDYJaKpWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
      - [**Issue:** Inconsistent terms for the enterprise search tool ("searchable knowledge graph," "enterprise search," etc.).](https://fathom.video/share/nhCGuza1EXZ-EJho9ss7jFJGDYJaKpWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will research the highest-intent term via SEMrush to ensure all content uses consistent, high-volume language.](https://fathom.video/share/nhCGuza1EXZ-EJho9ss7jFJGDYJaKpWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
  - [**Productivity Calculator:**](https://fathom.video/share/nhCGuza1EXZ-EJho9ss7jFJGDYJaKpWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
      - [**Idea:** A programmatic page to help teams benchmark and measure productivity, proving Read's impact beyond meeting reduction.](https://fathom.video/share/nhCGuza1EXZ-EJho9ss7jFJGDYJaKpWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will research programmatic page opportunities. This is a separate workstream requiring a new scope.](https://fathom.video/share/nhCGuza1EXZ-EJho9ss7jFJGDYJaKpWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)
  - [**"Morning Meetings" Article:**](https://fathom.video/share/nhCGuza1EXZ-EJho9ss7jFJGDYJaKpWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)
      - [**Idea:** A data-driven article on meeting times, leveraging a polarizing topic to drive engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/nhCGuza1EXZ-EJho9ss7jFJGDYJaKpWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)
      - [**Action:** Sarah will share her research; GrowthX will evaluate if it fits the content mix.](https://fathom.video/share/nhCGuza1EXZ-EJho9ss7jFJGDYJaKpWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)

### Featured Images

  - [**Decision:** Use the existing color-coded system for featured images to maintain brand consistency.](https://fathom.video/share/nhCGuza1EXZ-EJho9ss7jFJGDYJaKpWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)
      - [Case Study → Dark Blue](https://fathom.video/share/nhCGuza1EXZ-EJho9ss7jFJGDYJaKpWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)
      - [How-to → Green](https://fathom.video/share/nhCGuza1EXZ-EJho9ss7jFJGDYJaKpWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)
      - [Playbook → Red](https://fathom.video/share/nhCGuza1EXZ-EJho9ss7jFJGDYJaKpWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Justin:** Review the first 3 articles today for technical accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/nhCGuza1EXZ-EJho9ss7jFJGDYJaKpWF?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [**Justin & Sarah:** Sync tomorrow to validate the new review workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/nhCGuza1EXZ-EJho9ss7jFJGDYJaKpWF?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/nhCGuza1EXZ-EJho9ss7jFJGDYJaKpWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
      - [Research enterprise search terminology and programmatic page opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/nhCGuza1EXZ-EJho9ss7jFJGDYJaKpWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
      - [Implement the new Airtable review workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/nhCGuza1EXZ-EJho9ss7jFJGDYJaKpWF?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
      - [Share the "morning meetings" research with Sarah.](https://fathom.video/share/nhCGuza1EXZ-EJho9ss7jFJGDYJaKpWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)
  - [**Sarah:** Share "morning meetings" research with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/nhCGuza1EXZ-EJho9ss7jFJGDYJaKpWF?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)
